results.title: Eva Mendes steals husband Ryan Goslings style
results.description: Eva Mendes steals husband Ryan Goslings style Eva Mendes is affectionately stealing her husband's style. The Ghost Rider actress, 52, shared a pair of spunky snaps of herself on Instagram, sporting a familiar accessory: her husband Ryan Gosling's Saturday Night Live hat! The...
